name: Line Shot
desc: An attack that hits all units in a straight line.

name: LineShot2
desc: A stronger attack that hits all units in a straight line.

name: Hail of Nails
desc: An attack that hits all units in a perpendicular line.

name: HailOfNails2
desc: An attack that hits and Immobilizes all units in a perpendicular line.

name: Spawn Maggot Friend
desc: Spawn a maggot familiar.

name: SpawnMaggotFriend2
desc: Spawn a [img:champion] maggot familiar.

name: Spawn Pooter Friend
desc: Spawn a pooter familiar.

name: SpawnPooterFriend2
desc: Spawn 2 pooter familiars.

name: Marked
desc: Inflict Marked on a unit.

name: Marked
desc: Inflict Marked on a unit and all other units of the same type.

name: Scatter Shot
desc: Fire a bunch of shots randomly in an area.

name: ScatterShot2
desc: Fire a bunch of shots randomly in a large area.

name: Bramble Shot
desc: Fire a shot that spawns brambles in an area.

name: BrambleShot2
desc: Fire a shot that spawns brambles in a large area.

name: Bear Trap
desc: Set a trap within 5 tiles that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

name: BearTrap2
desc: Set a trap on any tile that damages and immobilizes units that walk over it.

name: Harpoon
desc: Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.

name: Harpoon2
desc:
Hook onto something in a straight line and drag yourself to it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Twin Shot
desc: Shoot twice.

name: TwinShot2
desc: Shoot thrice.

name: Cross Shot
desc: Shoot four projectiles in an X shape.

name: CrossShot2
desc: Shoot four penetrating projectiles in an X shape.

name: Bait Trap
desc: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies.

name: SpawnBaitTrap2
desc: Set a bait trap that attracts enemies and inflicts Poison and Slow when eaten.

name: Bomb Shot
desc: Toss a bomb that explodes and knocks units away.

name: BombShot2
desc: Toss a large bomb that explodes and knocks units away.

name: Summon Brambles
desc: Spawn brambles on any tile.

name: SummonBrambles2
desc: Spawn brambles in an area.

name: Fire Shot
desc: Shoot a projectile that inflicts Burn 2 and lights fires.

name: FireShot2
desc: Shoot a projectile with infinite range that inflicts Burn 4 and lights fires.

name: Trail Blazer
desc: Increase your movement. You're unaffected by tile effects until the end of the turn.

name: TrailBlazer2
desc: Double your movement.  You're unaffected by tile effects until the end of the turn.

name: Focus Shot
desc: Aim at a unit. On your next turn, shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield at that unit.

name: FocusShot2
desc: Shoot a projectile that always crits and ignores shield.

name: Shards
desc: Shoot a projectile that spawns glass.

name: Shards2
desc: Shoot a projectile that spawns glass in an area and inflicts Bleed 2.

name: Terrain Walk
desc: Teleport to any grass or water tile.

name: TerrainWalk2
desc: Teleport to any grass or water tile. Gain Stealth.

name: Extend
desc: Give a unit +3 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

name: Extend
desc: Give a unit +20 range and reach until the end of their next turn.

name: Chaos Shot
desc: Shoot a random unit within range.

name: ChaosShot2
desc: Shoot a random unit within range, twice!

name: Needle Shot
desc: Shoot a needle that deals damage, gives Thorns, and ignores shield.

name: NeedleShot2
desc: Shoot a needle that deals damage, gives Thorns, and ignores shield. This deals extra damage to enemies and gives extra Thorns to allies.

name: Spike Trap
desc: Set a trap that deals 8 damage.

name: SpikeTrap2
desc: Set a trap that deals 13 damage.

name: Flea Shot
desc: Shoot a flea at a unit.

name: FleaShot2
desc: Shoot a [img:champion] flea at a unit.

name: Web Trap
desc: Set a trap that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

name: WebTrap2
desc: Set a web trap on any tile that webs non-bug units that walk through it.

name: Last Hit
desc: Deal 1 damage to a unit. If this kills it, refresh your basic attack.

name: LastHit2
desc:
Deal 1 damage to a unit. If this kills it, refresh your basic attack. This ignores shield and can't miss.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Cupid's Arrow
desc: A shot that damages and inflicts Charm.

name: CupidsArrow2
desc:
A shot that damages and inflicts Charm 2.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Arrow Flurry
desc: Shoot 5 weak shots, each one has a 50% chance to miss.

name: ArrowFlurry2
desc: Shoot 5 weak shots, each one has a 50% chance to miss and 50% chance to crit!

name: Heavy Shot
desc: Shoot a high damage shot with a 50% chance to miss.

name: HeavyShot2
desc:
Shoot a high damage shot with a 50% chance to miss and a 50% chance to crit.
[s:.7](This spell has increased range.)[/s]

name: Stake Out
desc:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn.)[/s]

name: StakeOut2
desc:
End your turn. On your next turn, your ranged abilities deal double damage.
[s:.7](Costs 0 mana. Castable only if you haven't taken any other actions this turn other than your movement action.)[/s]

name: Ball of Spiders
desc: Throw a spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.

name: BallOfSpiders2
desc: Throw a stronger spider egg that spawns 3 spiderlings on impact.

name: Snipe
desc: Fire a shot exactly 6 tiles away that ignores shield and can't miss.

name: Snipe2
desc: Fire a stronger shot exactly 6 tiles away that ignores shield, can't miss, and has a 50% chance to crit.

name: Diversion
desc: Shoot a pebble. All enemies within 3 tiles move toward it.

name: Diversion2
desc: Shoot a pebble. All enemies within 3 tiles move toward it and gain Confusion.

name: Arrowsmith
desc: Gain +1 Bonus Attack at the start of your next turn.

name: ArrowSmith2
desc: You or another unit gains +1 Bonus Attack at the start of their next turn.

name: Tactical Retreat
desc: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

name: TacticalRetreat2
desc: Teleport up to 5 tiles away. Set a baited bear trap on the tile you teleported from.

name: Infest
desc: Toss a spider egg that deals low damage and inflicts Infested.

name: Infest2
desc: Toss a spider egg that deals low damage and inflicts Infested 2.

name: Collect Pelt
desc: Destroy a body. Equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

name: CollectPelt2
desc: Destroy a body. Create a big food pickup and equip a piece of Cat Hide armor to an empty armor slot.

name: Sentry Mode
desc: The next time an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

name: Sentry Mode
desc: Until your next turn, whenever an enemy ends movement in your basic attack range, attack it.

name: Pheromones
desc: Inflict Charm on a unit. If it's an enemy, it takes an extra turn immediately.

name: Pheromones
desc: Inflict Charm on a unit. It takes an extra turn immediately.

name: Call of the Wild
desc: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom.

name: SpawnTomTomFriend2
desc: Spawn a charmed Tom Tom on any tile.

name: Scout Me
desc:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: ScoutMe2
desc:
Until next turn, allied cats gain a bonus ability that can let you shoot a tile of their choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

name: Shoot Here!
desc:
Instructs your friend to shoot an adjacent tile!
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Craft Arrow
desc: Collect an adjacent pickup and gain +1 Bonus Attack instead of its normal effects.

name: CraftArrow2
desc:
Collect all pickups within two tiles of you. Gain +1 Bonus Attack for each pickup instead of their normal effects.
[s:.7](This spell costs 1 mana.)[/s]

name: Charm Trap
desc: Spawn a trap that deals damage and inflicts Charm 1.

name: CharmTrap2
desc:
Spawn a trap that deals damage and inflicts Charm 1.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Bounce Shot
desc: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles.

name: BounceShot2
desc: Shoot a projectile that bounces everything adjacent to it back 3 tiles. They take 5 damage if they collide with something.

name: Picnic
desc: You and adjacent units each heal 5 HP.

name: Picnic2
desc: You and adjacent units each heal 5 HP and gain +1 Damage.

name: Soothing Shot
desc: A ranged shot that heals and inflicts Charmed 1.

name: Soothing Shot
desc:
A ranged shot that heals and inflicts Charmed 2.
Against allies this cleanses debuffs and inflicts Charmed 1 instead.

name: Vivisect
desc: A melee attack that spawns a baited bear trap if it kills a unit or destroys a body.

name: Vivisect
desc: A lobbed attack that spawns a baited bear trap if it kills a unit or destroys a body.

name: Poison Lace
desc: Give yourself or an adjacent unit +1 Poison Lace.

name: PoisonLace2
desc: Give yourself or any other unit +1 Poison Lace.

name: Slop the Pigs
desc: Each familiar in an area gains All Stats Up and heals 4 HP. Other units in the area gain +1 [img:con] and heal 2 HP.

name: SlopThePigs2
desc:
Each familiar in an area gains All Stats Up and heals 4 HP. Other units in the area gain +1 [img:con] and heal 2 HP.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Egg Sac Trap
desc: Spawn a spider egg trap that inflicts Infested 4.

name: SpiderInjector2
desc: Spawn a spider egg trap that deals damage and inflicts Infested 4.

name: Persistent Hunt
desc:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit. 
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.

name: PersistentHunt2
desc:
Inflict Marked 5 on a unit.
RELOAD: Kill an enemy.
This spell starts reloaded.

name: Hedge In
desc: Spawn bear traps on each adjacent tile.

name: Bunker2
desc: Spawn bear traps on each tile exactly 2 tiles away.
